name: claude-git-tools
title: Claude Git Tools
description: Git push and create PR powered by Claude
author: wang0122xl

commands.name: git-push
commands.title: Git Push
commands.description: Use Claude to git push changes in a selected repository

commands.name: create-pr
commands.title: Create PR
commands.description: Use Claude to create a pull request in a selected repository

commands.name: manage-folders
commands.title: Manage Folders & Skills
commands.description: Manage folders and skill files for git commands

commands.name: manage-model
commands.title: Manage Model
commands.description: Select the Claude model to use (haiku, sonnet, opus)

commands.name: review-pr
commands.title: Review PR
commands.description: Review a pull request using Claude

commands.name: view-tasks
commands.title: View Tasks
commands.description: View running and completed Claude git tasks
